steps.title: Target the formation process
steps.content: The student wants to describe how meanders form. The relevant note is the cause-and-effect process: water erodes sediment from one bank and redeposits it on the opposite bank, producing a U-shaped curve.

steps.title: Reject nonformation details
steps.content: A focuses on the Ucayali River, not the process. B says meanders move over time after forming. C combines high sinuosity with later movement. The needed sentence explains erosion, redeposition, and the resulting curve. The answer is D.
